productDisplayName: Converse Men Rainbow Purple Flip Flop
description: converse refuses to be stereotyped as the brand that only makes canvas shoes. These rainbow hued flip flops celebrate summer with their colour happy tones on the footbed. Wear this with any off-duty ensemble to snazz up your outfit. Please note: stripe pattern is variable Upper Rubber thong style straps with branding Rubber toe separator Multi-hued rubber footbed with printed branding Outsole Rubber outsole with terraced grooved Slipper care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
